sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1048" key="a)gxistiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγχιστ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n1048.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀγχιστεία</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0708.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ammon.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Diff.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
